title: Hyperliquid - Open App
meta_description: hyperliquid opens the official trading app for onchain perps, spot markets, wallet or email access, and deposits.
hero_h2: Trade onchain perpetuals from the official app
hero_lead: Hyperliquid is the app-first route to fully onchain perpetual futures, spot markets, and account access through a wallet or email.
what_is: Hyperliquid is a layer-one blockchain and decentralized exchange centered on fully onchain perpetual futures and spot order books; see the official docs for the core architecture.

how.d: Go to the official trading route and verify the domain before connecting any wallet or email account.
Use an EVM wallet or the supported email login flow, then enable trading when prompted by the app.
Follow the app flow for supported collateral; the official guide lists USDC on Arbitrum and other supported assets.
Choose a perp market, select long or short, review size and leverage, then confirm the order only if the risk fits your plan.

points.p: HyperCore includes fully onchain perpetual futures and spot order books, with order, cancel, trade, and liquidation activity visible onchain.
The official trading guide confirms wallet and email access plus the app.hyperliquid.xyz route.
HyperCore handles native order books while HyperEVM adds EVM-compatible applications on the same blockchain.

faq.a: Hyperliquid is used to trade perpetual futures and spot markets through a non-custodial, onchain exchange app.

faq.q: How do I start trading on hyperliquid?
faq.a: Open the official app, connect a wallet or email login, deposit supported collateral, choose a market, and review the order before confirming.
The official onboarding docs list USDC on Arbitrum and other supported assets for deposits; always check the live app before sending funds.
Yes. HyperEVM is part of the same blockchain and interacts with HyperCore components such as spot and perp order books.

faq.q: Is this hyperliquid page the official app?
faq.a: No. This page is a routing and education page; the official trading app is at app.hyperliquid.xyz.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify app.hyperliquid.xyz before connecting. Educational content only, not financial advice.
